title: Bidoof Day Art Competition
author: Markio
description: The Intra-Society Anime Quiz was an EPIC showdown, and the results? Mind-blowing! From jaw-dropping trivia to intense battles of otaku knowledge, we witnessed friendships forged and rivalries born!

title: Cosplay 2023 Coverage
venue: In front of Main Academic Building, IIT Kharagpur
author: Nishkal Prakash
description: The memories of college life condensed over long years, come to an explosive close, with the graduating batch cosplaying as their favourite characters.

title: One Piece: Gear 5 Screening
author: Nishkal Prakash
description: The first-ever anime screening event at the Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur) took place with electrifying enthusiasm and excitement on Sunday, 9:00 pm 13th August, 2023.

title: Intra-Soc Anime Quiz 2024
author: Markio
description: A quiz event held by the Fresher Quiz members, exclusively for the members of MASK, held at an undisclosed location.

title: Intra-Soc Anime Quiz Extravaganza
author: Gargi Raj
description: The Intra-Society Anime Quiz was an EPIC showdown, and the results? Mind-blowing! From jaw-dropping trivia to intense battles of otaku knowledge, we witnessed friendships forged and rivalries born!

title: Open Campus Anime Quiz 2023
author: NPC
description: MASK's Open Campus Anime Quiz was back, and it did not disappoint! The atmosphere crackled with energy as questions flew back and forth, with each answer met by cheers and groans.

title: Open Campus Anime Quiz 2024
author: Rishabh Dehariya
description: MASK's Open Campus Anime Quiz was back, and it did not disappoint! The atmosphere crackled with energy as questions flew back and forth, with each answer met by cheers and groans.

title: Quad Anime Trivia Quiz
author: Ayush Parmar
description: Anime enthusiasts recently united for an electrifying quiz event, showcasing their knowledge and competing for exclusive merch and enticing prizes. Relive the excitement of this unforgettable celebration, where fans celebrated their shared love for anime in a thrilling clash of wits and passion.

title: Anime Seekers' Quest
author: Dio Brando
description: With nothing but clues, anime knowledge, friendships and wits, search around the campus for the treasure of the fans before the sun goes down. The Anime Seekers’ Quest was our first hands-on event, covering the campus with our clues and with prizes worth the search.

title: Suzume no Tojimari Trip
author: Dio Brando
description: To watch the new Makoto Shinkai movie, Suzume no Tojimari, we went to South City Mall. From toto races, early sunday morning trains, bus rides full of jokes, and a wonderful cinematic experience, this trip was our last big thing for this semester.

title: The Anime Seekers' Quest 2024
author: Dalli Manideep
description: A thrilling treasure hunt blending anime knowledge, teamwork, and adventurous spirits in the heart of KGP campus!

title: Your Name Screening
author: Varun Ponnekanti
description: The much anticipated anime movie screening of Your Name (Kimi no Na Wa) after a very successful One Piece: Gear 5 screening the previous year took place on an unusually enthusiastic Monday night of 12th August, 2024.
